title: bellis annua subsp. repens
intro: Bellis annua subsp. repens, also known as creeping daisy or lawn daisy, is a perennial plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is also known to have health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Bellis annua subsp. repens include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
